description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the harbottle/wix:latest Docker image and defines a single stage called build. Add a job named build:msi in the build stage that executes the following shell commands in order: cd example, x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc ./example.c -o ./example.exe, candle example.wxs, and light -sval example.wixobj. The job should publish any generated *.msi files under the example/ directory as build artifacts. No caches, variables, services, or conditional rules are required.
